markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy to drive conversions and compete with Udex.](https://fathom.video/share/xAzMyQcTgYRKQxSypnRx97XRmxQKFzE9?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Content Strategy:** Shift to high-intent content (e.g., "Top X Tools") and direct competitor comparisons (vs. Udex) to increase conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/xAzMyQcTgYRKQxSypnRx97XRmxQKFzE9?tab=summary&timestamp=1734.0)
  - [**Differentiate vs. Udex:** Frame Yourco as a superior enterprise solution with SOC 2 security, enterprise-grade admin, and one-way/two-way communication.](https://fathom.video/share/xAzMyQcTgYRKQxSypnRx97XRmxQKFzE9?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [**New LLM Tracking:** Migrate from Scrunch to GrowthX's internal tool, `checkthat.ai`, for better data, historical context, and direct client access.](https://fathom.video/share/xAzMyQcTgYRKQxSypnRx97XRmxQKFzE9?tab=summary&timestamp=1801.0)
  - [**Link Exchange Opportunity:** Explore a mutual link exchange between Yourco and `checkthat.ai` to build domain authority, with a potential connection to client Engine.](https://fathom.video/share/xAzMyQcTgYRKQxSypnRx97XRmxQKFzE9?tab=summary&timestamp=3365.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy & Performance

  - [**Problem:** Traffic is up (+70.4% MoM), but conversions remain low, indicating a need for higher-intent content.](https://fathom.video/share/xAzMyQcTgYRKQxSypnRx97XRmxQKFzE9?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [**Solution:** Focus on three content directions:](https://fathom.video/share/xAzMyQcTgYRKQxSypnRx97XRmxQKFzE9?tab=summary&timestamp=1734.0)
    1.  [**"Top X Tools" Listicles:** Create definitive lists for key use cases (e.g., "Top Communication Tools for Hospitality").](https://fathom.video/share/xAzMyQcTgYRKQxSypnRx97XRmxQKFzE9?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
    2.  [**Deep-Dive Q\&A:** Answer specific, high-intent questions within existing articles.](https://fathom.video/share/xAzMyQcTgYRKQxSypnRx97XRmxQKFzE9?tab=summary&timestamp=2108.0)
    3.  [**Direct Competitor Comparisons:** Create content directly comparing Yourco vs. Udex.](https://fathom.video/share/xAzMyQcTgYRKQxSypnRx97XRmxQKFzE9?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
  - [**Execution:** Double down on top-performing subclusters (Scheduling, Call-Offs, Surveys) and under-represented topics (Compliance, SOPs).](https://fathom.video/share/xAzMyQcTgYRKQxSypnRx97XRmxQKFzE9?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)

### Yourco vs. Udex: Key Differentiators

  - [**Security:** Yourco is SOC 2 compliant; Udex is not.](https://fathom.video/share/xAzMyQcTgYRKQxSypnRx97XRmxQKFzE9?tab=summary&timestamp=483.0)
  - [**Enterprise-Grade Admin:** Yourco offers a multi-level structure (Super Admin → Admin → Manager) for HQ oversight and local control.](https://fathom.video/share/xAzMyQcTgYRKQxSypnRx97XRmxQKFzE9?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [**Communication Modes:** Yourco supports both one-way blasts and two-way conversations; Udex is primarily two-way.](https://fathom.video/share/xAzMyQcTgYRKQxSypnRx97XRmxQKFzE9?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
  - [**"Frontline Intelligence":** Yourco's core brand message, emphasizing data-driven insights beyond simple communication.](https://fathom.video/share/xAzMyQcTgYRKQxSypnRx97XRmxQKFzE9?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)

### New LLM Tracking Tool: `checkthat.ai`

  - [**Migration:** Replacing Scrunch with GrowthX's internal tool, `checkthat.ai`.](https://fathom.video/share/xAzMyQcTgYRKQxSypnRx97XRmxQKFzE9?tab=summary&timestamp=1801.0)
  - [**Key Advantages:**](https://fathom.video/share/xAzMyQcTgYRKQxSypnRx97XRmxQKFzE9?tab=summary&timestamp=2773.0)
      - [**Historical Data:** Provides 90 days of data immediately upon setup.](https://fathom.video/share/xAzMyQcTgYRKQxSypnRx97XRmxQKFzE9?tab=summary&timestamp=2773.0)
      - [**Cost-Effective:** No per-prompt fees.](https://fathom.video/share/xAzMyQcTgYRKQxSypnRx97XRmxQKFzE9?tab=summary&timestamp=2796.0)
      - [**Direct Access:** Yourco will get admin-level access for self-service analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/xAzMyQcTgYRKQxSypnRx97XRmxQKFzE9?tab=summary&timestamp=2832.0)
  - [**Status:** In beta; Yourco's public profile description is auto-generated and inaccurate, but can be updated by an admin.](https://fathom.video/share/xAzMyQcTgYRKQxSypnRx97XRmxQKFzE9?tab=summary&timestamp=3122.0)

### Link Exchange Opportunity

  - [**Proposal:** A mutual link exchange between Yourco and `checkthat.ai` to build domain authority.](https://fathom.video/share/xAzMyQcTgYRKQxSypnRx97XRmxQKFzE9?tab=summary&timestamp=3365.0)
  - [**Benefit for Yourco:** Gain high-quality backlinks from a relevant domain.](https://fathom.video/share/xAzMyQcTgYRKQxSypnRx97XRmxQKFzE9?tab=summary&timestamp=3436.0)
  - [**Benefit for `checkthat.ai`:** Build its own domain authority.](https://fathom.video/share/xAzMyQcTgYRKQxSypnRx97XRmxQKFzE9?tab=summary&timestamp=3436.0)
  - [**Client Connection:** Explore a link exchange with client Engine (travel/expense management) due to a similar frontline audience.](https://fathom.video/share/xAzMyQcTgYRKQxSypnRx97XRmxQKFzE9?tab=summary&timestamp=3489.0)

  - [**Jessica:**](https://fathom.video/share/xAzMyQcTgYRKQxSypnRx97XRmxQKFzE9?tab=summary&timestamp=3838.0)

      - [Evaluate the link exchange proposal with Brody.](https://fathom.video/share/xAzMyQcTgYRKQxSypnRx97XRmxQKFzE9?tab=summary&timestamp=3430.0)
